name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 49 of operational silence. MASHHAD MURAL DAY 5 OF 7-DAY REFUTATION WINDOW (CLOSES 2026-05-04); MOJTABA SILENT THROUGH TRUMP-AXIOS REJECTION + RIAL 1.8M COLLAPSE — NO PUBLIC RESPONSE TO EITHER. The two highest-stakes events of the past 24 hours (Trump's Axios 'choking like a stuffed pig' rejection of Hormuz-First doctrine and rial collapse to 1.8M record low) produced NO Mojtaba video, no Mojtaba statement carried by IRNA/Press TV/Tasnim/Fars in current-event framing. The regime has 48 hours left in the 7-day refutation window. Per Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier, Mojtaba is 'figurehead, not principal' — IRGC inner circle led by Vahidi dominates. ISW Day 8: 'unable to seriously impact Iranian decision-making due to injuries.' NYT prosthetic-leg detail intact. Mashhad mural exists, regime has NOT refuted. Pravda EN Apr 28 'Mojtaba is firmly in control and has met in-person with high ranking officials including Pezeshkian' is RUSSIA STATE MEDIA CLAIM, single-source/uncorroborated by Western or Iranian-independent outlets. Brief should NOT call Mojtaba dead (factual claim requires regime confirmation) but SHOULD note the silence is now 49 days running, mural unrefuted at Day 5 of 7. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Reuters Apr 28 analysis 'Iran's Guards Seize Wartime Power, Blunting Supreme Leader's Role' (carried by USNews, Times of Israel, Japan Times, Al-Monitor, Express Tribune, Fox News, Israel Hayom, MarketScreener, Kathmandu Post): 'Mojtaba Khamenei's role is largely to legitimize decisions made by his generals rather than issue directives himself' — explicitly names Mojtaba as FIGUREHEAD, NOT PRINCIPAL. Three Iranian-deliberation sources cited. The graph's six-source medical-incapacitation thesis is now formally adopted at WIRE-LEVEL. Combined with Mashhad mural (still not refuted) and NYT/Israel Hayom prosthetic-leg detail (April 23: three surgeries on one leg with possible prosthetic, severe burns to face/lips making speech difficult, communication via handwritten messages in sealed envelopes), the qualitative bar on Mojtaba's incapacitation has shifted decisively in the analytical community. ISW Day 8: 'Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is likely unable to seriously impact Iranian decision-making due to injuries sustained during the war.' Day 4 of 7-day refutation window — no video, no audio, no substantive statement from Mojtaba Khamenei. Iranian state media has NOT refuted the Mashhad mural. The IRGC is the operational decisionmaker — Reuters wire confirms 'central interlocutor has been IRGC commander Ahmad Vahidi.' The brief should NOT call him dead — that is a specific factual claim requiring Iranian regime confirmation. EDGE WEIGHT: mojtaba-khamenei → iran should DECREASE per intel.md F5 (Reuters explicitly names figurehead role). Trigger watching: Iranian state media releases Mojtaba video/audio refuting the mural within 7 days (by 2026-05-04). Russian-source claim that Putin received 'a message from Mojtaba Khamenei' remains REPORTED single-source from Asia Plus / Express Tribune. New York Times reporting (cited via Israel Hayom April 23, Gateway Pundit, Globalsecurity) describes Mojtaba: three surgeries on one leg with possible prosthetic, hand surgery in recovery, severe burns to face/lips making speech difficult. Access to him 'extremely difficult and limited' — IRGC commanders avoiding in-person visits to prevent Israel tracking. Communication via handwritten messages in sealed envelopes through couriers on side roads. Power delegated under 'board' model, central players: Hossein Taeb, Mohsen Rezaei, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf (parliament speaker). The Mashhad 'Martyrs' mural unveiled April 26 has NOT been refuted by Iranian state media as of today (Day 2 of refutation window; full window closes 2026-05-04 per graph). The 7-day refutation trigger remains WATCHING. ISW's Day 8 of Vahidi-as-apex framework explicitly states: 'Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is likely unable to seriously impact Iranian decision-making due to injuries sustained during the war' — first time ISW has stated the medical-incapacitation thesis in operative-judgment terms (vs prior framing of 'questions remain about' condition). The graph's six-source medical-incapacitation thesis is now formally adopted by ISW. Combined with the Mashhad mural (still not refuted) and the NYT/Israel Hayom prosthetic-leg detail, the qualitative bar on Mojtaba's incapacitation has shifted decisively in the analytical community. The IRGC is the operational decisionmaker, not Mojtaba. Iran International (opposition diaspora) and Iran's state media confirm no public appearance since March 2026. AI-generated video showing Mojtaba in a 'command center' was debunked early April per multiple fact-checks (Grok, Deccan Herald, MEAWW, WION). New mural unveiled in Mashhad Sunday April 26 titled 'Martyrs' shows portraits of those killed in the war between Iran and US-Israel forces (CONFIRMED via WION, The Week, India.com, Sunday Guardian, Al Bawaba video footage). At centre: large portrait of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei (assassinated February 28). Around him: four smaller portraits, allegedly including current Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei depicted alongside deceased figures. Iranian officials have NOT clarified, NOT denied, NOT released a Mojtaba video to refute. The Week explicitly notes: 'could not independently verify the allegations of his death… no official confirmation regarding his death.' Three reads: (a) Mojtaba is dead and regime is preparing iconographic disclosure before formal announcement; (b) tactical iconographic move (martyrdom-as-mobilisation) without literal death; (c) lower-level miscoordination at Mashhad civil-religious infrastructure. TIE-BREAKER: a regime that has used AI-generated videos to simulate Mojtaba's voice (Time April 21) but has NOT released a refutation video Sunday-Monday in response to the viral mural — that non-response is itself a tell. If the regime could refute, it would; the silence implies the regime cannot or chooses not to refute. The Mashhad mural visually reinforces the existing six-source medical-incapacitation thesis at Iran's own civil-religious infrastructure. The brief should NOT call him dead — that is a specific factual claim that requires Iranian regime confirmation; but the brief SHOULD note the mural exists, the regime has not refuted, and the existing thesis is now being visually reinforced. New trigger watching: Iranian state media releases Mojtaba video/audio refuting the mural within 7 days (by 2026-05-04) — silence past that window upgrades the medical-incapacitation thesis to operational-weight (factually equivalent to incapacitation, with death as plausible reading).

signals.content: Appointed Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. Selected over other candidates. His personal loss (family killed) may drive hardline stance.

First statement read on Press TV by anchor (no video/audio of Khamenei himself). Called for national unity, Hormuz to remain closed, US bases to be attacked. Nearly 2 weeks in, no visual confirmation of new leader.

Day 29 of conflict — still no video or audio recording of Mojtaba Khamenei released. His only communication remains a written statement read by a TV anchor on March 12. No Nowruz address (March 20). CIA/DIA testified in classified hearing that Iran is in a 'deep command and control crisis.' The 29-day absence is unprecedented for Iran's supreme leadership and could mean injury, extreme security measures, or internal power struggle. Absence is itself a significant data point — Tehran typically denies false claims within hours, and the continued non-appearance amounts to tacit acknowledgment of leadership difficulties. (Sources: CNN analysis, Iran International, NPR)

Day 31+ without video/audio — longest gap in 47-year Islamic Republic history. Soufan Center: US intel assesses 'very seriously injured.' 'No regime figure claims to have met or talked with him in person.' One US official: 'no proof he is holding the reins.' Senior Israeli official: same assessment. The Media Line: first statement (March 12) was 'dictated by IRGC.' Practical effect: IRGC is the decision-making authority regardless of which scenario is true (incapacitated, hidden, or dead). Any deal must be accepted by IRGC. Leaked audio about 'minor leg injury' not independently confirmed.

Day 34 of war, Day 25 since appointment as Supreme Leader on March 8. Still NO video or audio appearance. Iran's FM stated he is in 'good health' and 'may make public appearance in near future.' Russian envoy claimed he 'was still in Iran.' Al Jazeera published opinion piece (April 1) discussing 'rumoured injury or death.' Manifold prediction market (March 8-April 1) resolved NO on video proof of life — the market found no verifiable evidence of his public presence. IRGC has consolidated significant control: blocking Pezeshkian's appointments, controlling information flow to Supreme Leader, influencing appointment of top leaders. CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' testimony remains uncontradicted by any intelligence service. CONFIRMED ABSENCE. (Sources: The Week India, Al Jazeera, Life News Agency, Manifold)

Day 35: Still no video or audio of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. Iran FM promises appearance 'in the near future.' CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' testimony remains uncontradicted. Manifold prediction market reportedly resolved NO on video appearance. Written statements only, read by state TV anchors. The prolonged absence may reflect: (1) injury more severe than admitted, (2) security — avoiding targetable appearances, (3) internal IRGC control where military council holds actual power. Explanation 3 is supported by Ghalibaf/IRGC hawkishness diverging from FM engagement. (Sources: Iran International, Times of Israel, CNN)

Day 37 of war, Day 28 since appointment. Still NO video or audio appearance of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. FM's 'near future' appearance promise (from earlier in week) unfulfilled. CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' testimony remains uncontradicted. No new information. Longest gap in 47-year Islamic Republic supreme leadership history. IRGC stream dominant in media space — F-15 triumphalism coming from IRGC, not supreme leader. CONFIRMED ABSENCE continues. (Sources: Iran International, Manifold, Soufan Center)

Day 38 of war, Day 29+ since appointment. AI-GENERATED FAKE VIDEO DEBUNKED: On April 5, account GBX_Press posted video on X claiming to show Mojtaba Khamenei 'heading to a military operations room' with Israel's Dimona nuclear reactor coordinates on display screen. DEBUNKED as AI-generated — fact-checkers identified 'blurred facial details, unnatural lighting patterns, and glitch-like transitions.' Frame analysis suggests older footage of Ali Khamenei digitally reused and overlaid. No Iranian state media (IRNA, IRIB, Tasnim) authenticated it. No international outlets verified it. The AI fake is itself significant — signals DEMAND for proof-of-life content that doesn't exist, creating a market for fabrication. Russian Ambassador Dedov (March 31): Mojtaba 'remains in Iran but refraining from appearing in public.' ZERO verified video or audio appearances. FM 'good health' claim remains unverified. CONFIRMED ABSENCE continuing.

Day 39 without verified public appearance (video/audio). All communications remain written statements only. Araghchi reassured on April 1 he is 'in good health' and 'expected to appear soon.' Russia's ambassador confirmed he 'remains in Iran.' Iran International (opposition-leaning) reported 'errors' in his first message that were 'dictated by the IRGC.' FDD analysis identifies Ghalibaf as one of '5 men now running Iran' — a former IRGC Air Force commander now leading negotiations. The real power center appears to be the IRGC-SNSC axis, not the Supreme Leader's office. Pezeshkian was SILENT on deadline day — may indicate civilian government sidelined. (Sources: Iran International, FDD, Al Jazeera)

DAY 39 — ZERO PUBLIC APPEARANCES. No public appearance. Iran International confirms statements continue to come via written messages read by state TV anchors. The April 5 GBX_Press AI-fake from yesterday (Mojtaba 'in operations room with Dimona coordinates') remains debunked. Day 39 of war, Day 30 since appointment, ZERO verified video/audio appearances. Russian Ambassador Dedov's March 31 statement remains the only diplomatic confirmation he is 'in Iran but for obvious reasons refraining from appearing in public.' Iran continues to fight a major war, conducting tripartite salvos and decapitation negotiations, while its declared supreme leader has not been seen publicly for 30 days. The command structure visible to the world is Araghchi (FM), Ghalibaf (Parliament Speaker), IRGC commanders. Whoever is actually in command, it is not visibly Mojtaba.

EVENING UPDATE: Times of Israel reported Mojtaba Khamenei 'unconscious and receiving treatment in Qom in severe condition, unable to govern' per diplomatic memo based on US/Israeli intelligence. ISW/Critical Threats separately assessed 'military council of senior IRGC officers has assumed core decision-making power' — mutually reinforcing. April 7 written statement on Khademi's death was again text-only (posted on X by proxy). HOWEVER: ToI report is single-source with adversarial intelligence basis — both US and Israel have incentive to portray Iranian leadership as incapacitated. Continued absence remains CONFIRMED FACT (Day 39). (Sources: Times of Israel, ISW/Critical Threats, Tribune India)

FIRST OFFICIAL IRANIAN INVOCATION OF MOJTABA KHAMENEI'S 'GUIDANCE' SINCE DAY 1 [REPORTED]. Iran's SNSC statement formally accepting the ceasefire stated the decision was made 'according to the guidance of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and the approval of the Supreme National Security Council,' and that subsequent negotiations are 'under the supervision of the supreme leader and the highest levels of the system.' This is the first explicit Iranian state assertion of his functional decision-making authority since Day 1 — a direct counter-narrative to the ToI 'unconscious in Qom' report and the ISW 'IRGC military council assumed core decision-making power' assessment. Iran is asserting Mojtaba is functional even as no audio/video evidence is provided. Three readings: (1) He IS recovering and authorising decisions; (2) The IRGC military council is using his name as institutional fig-leaf while he remains incapacitated; (3) Partial recovery with limited functioning. Iran's military DID obey ceasefire orders within ~2 hours — suggests a functional chain of command at SOME level. The trigger point ('appears on video/audio') remains UNFIRED — written invocation by SNSC is not direct appearance. Day 40 still no audio or video.

DAY 41 — STILL NO VERIFIED PUBLIC APPEARANCE. The April 8 SNSC written invocation remains the SOLE institutional assertion of his functional authority. Absence as intelligence: the ceasefire fractured within 18 hours of his first 'guidance' — and the IRNA-Tasnim media divergence (civilian government building deal-preserving narrative vs IRGC building exit narrative) is the strongest evidence yet that the 'IRGC military council using his name as institutional fig-leaf' reading may be correct. If Mojtaba were functional, an IRNA/Tasnim split of this magnitude would require his arbitration. The (REPORTED, Iran International single-source) Pezeshkian-Taeb confrontation describing IRGC as having 'effectively stripped the government of executive control' is consistent with this reading. Trigger ('appears on video/audio') remains UNFIRED. The next 48 hours — Friday April 10 Islamabad talks — are the critical window for either appearance (legitimating recovery) or continued silence (validating fig-leaf reading).

Day 43 without verified video/audio appearance. April 9: state TV read written statement attributed to Mojtaba saying Iran 'astonished the world' and demanding 'compensation, not war.' Same format as all prior communications. A viral video purporting to show him in military operations room with Dimona maps was DEBUNKED as AI-GENERATED by Lead Stories — did NOT appear on any official Iranian account. Information warfare signal: intelligence vacuum enabling fabricated content. 'Unconscious in Qom' memo remains CLAIMED (single source amplified). US DefSec Hegseth claimed 'wounded and likely disfigured' without evidence. No Iranian official confirmation or denial of any health claim. (Source: Al Jazeera, Lead Stories, Amwaj Media)

Day 44 without verified video/audio. 9-page written statement released April 10 via Telegram channel, marking 40 days since Ali Khamenei's death. HARDEST LINE YET on Hormuz: 'We will undoubtedly usher the management of the Strait of Hormuz into a new phase.' Demanded 'reparations for every single injury inflicted, blood money for martyrs, compensation for the disabled.' Called for citizens' 'presence in the squares' as leverage on negotiations. Separately, security cordon REPORTED around Mojtaba preventing government access — Pezeshkian's 'repeated requests' for meetings have 'all gone unanswered' (reported by Iran International, NOT confirmed). Breitbart: 'unconscious' claim — single source, low confidence. AI-generated command room video previously debunked by Lead Stories (not from official accounts). The absence is structurally significant for Islamabad: who is the Iranian delegation actually reporting to?

Reuters reported (April 11) that Mojtaba Khamenei has 'severe and disfiguring wounds' including facial and leg injuries, and may have 'lost a leg.' He is conscious but incapacitated. Day 47+ of no public appearance (REPORTED — single Reuters source for severity of wounds). Decision-making may be operating through proxies — senior adviser Ali Akbar Velayati stated April 12 that 'the key to the Strait of Hormuz is firmly in Iran's hands,' a Supreme Leader's office statement channeled through Velayati rather than Mojtaba directly (CONFIRMED — PressTV, Tasnim, Anadolu Agency). The multi-vocal Iranian response to the blockade (Pezeshkian to Macron, IRGC threats, Ghalibaf defiance, Velayati claims) may reflect the absence of a single authoritative voice directing strategy — or alternatively, deliberate ambiguity. The absence's EFFECT is observable in the fragmented response structure. No new video/audio. Trigger remains unfired.

Day 48 without public video or audio appearance. Conflicting reports persist: Times of Israel ('disfigured, treated for severe wounds'), Asharq al-Awsat ('unconscious, incapacitated'), The Week India ('may have lost leg, but mentally sharp, meetings via audio'), i24News ('in a coma'). No resolution. CIA/DIA: Iran in 'deep command and control crisis.' Written messages attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei continue — no video, no audio. The silence IS the data. (Sources: Times of Israel, Asharq al-Awsat, The Week India, i24News, Amwaj Media)

DAY 52+ WITHOUT VERIFIED APPEARANCE — HAARETZ 'MOJTABA NAVY'S READY' ANGLE NOT ELEVATED [CONFIRMED single-source status]. Haaretz floated Saturday a 'Mojtaba Navy's Ready' angle that has NOT been elevated or amplified by other Israeli outlets Sunday morning IST. The single-source-attribution concern flagged in prior brief still stands. Node activation remains PAUSED until a Persian-language primary surfaces — neither Press TV nor Tasnim nor IRNA has carried Mojtaba-attributed material on the Saturday kinetic or Sunday SNSC statement. Sunday SNSC institutional consolidation is civilian-apex (Pezeshkian-chaired) + IRGC endorsement with Mojtaba absent from the visible command chain; nominal third pillar role not exercised. If Mojtaba's office were functional and arbitrating, the SNSC text would likely carry 'guidance of Supreme Leader' framing of the April 8 ceasefire-acceptance type; it did not. Circumstantial evidence supports continued incapacitation / absence reading; no new primary evidence either way. (Sources: Haaretz single-source, Press TV / Tasnim / IRNA Persian-language absence, CNN / Western-outlet absence of amplification)

SUPREME LEADER OFFICE SILENT ON ARAGHCHI IMPEACHMENT MATTER SECOND DAY; MAHMOUDI NAMED AS MOVER (NOT AZIZI) [CONFIRMED absences; CORRECTION on naming]. Mojtaba Khamenei's office silent Monday AM on Mahmoudi's impeachment statement, Kayhan/Tasnim FM attacks, and Touska seizure. Parliament-state-media-IRGC triangle now aligned against Araghchi with only civilian executive (Pezeshkian) remaining ambiguously positioned — also silent. Refines Friday reporting: the named impeachment mover is MP Morteza Mahmoudi, not Ebrahim Azizi; motion paused "for wartime considerations."

MOJTABA RESPONSE EXPECTED WEDNESDAY — FORCING FUNCTION ELEVATED [REPORTED]. Axios/Fortune Tuesday: US and Pakistani mediators awaiting Mojtaba's response; Iranian negotiators waiting 'for a green light from the supreme leader.' CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen.' Time 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme.' Public absence since April 10 Al Jazeera statement. 'Seriously fractured' framing Trump adopted Tuesday leans directly on this uncertainty. A substantive Wednesday statement is now THE forcing function of the crisis calendar.

WEDNESDAY-RESPONSE PREDICTION OVERDUE — DAY 41 OF PUBLIC ABSENCE HOLDS [CONFIRMED ABSENCE]. By 21:00 IST Wednesday the response has not materialised — IRNA, Tasnim, Press TV, and state TV have not carried any Mojtaba statement Wednesday. CNN's Tuesday 'nowhere to be seen' framing intensifying. Axios Wednesday on US-official sourcing now identifies Vahidi (IRGC C-in-C) as 'only one who meets the new Supreme Leader face-to-face' and is described as 'practically controlling the country, blocking attempts of Pezeshkian to appoint a new intelligence minister.' Mojtaba reportedly dealing with serious injury preventing full role discharge. The Wednesday operational silence + on-record IRGC kinetic action (MSC Francesca/Epaminondas seizure under IRGC institutional banner without civilian-government cover) = the Vahidi camp is winning the internal fight; the 'Mojtaba green light' Axios was waiting for is structurally improbable. Forcing function migrated from 'Wednesday Mojtaba response' to 'Trump's 3-5 day patience window' (expires ~Sunday April 26 IST per Axios).
sources: Axios 'Trump gives Iran days to end power struggle'
Time 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme'
CNN 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen'

signals.content: DAY 42 — STILL NO IRNA/TASNIM/PRESS TV/FARS NEW STATEMENT THURSDAY MORNING [CONFIRMED ABSENCE]. Friday 23:59 IST trigger does not fire until Friday but pre-firing silence continues. The structural addition this cycle: CNN April 21 framing 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen. That might be helping the regime to survive.' Time 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' is now weekly stablemate. Mojtaba silence operationally functioning as COVER for Vahidi-camp assertion of control rather than as pause before unifying intervention — incapacitation reading (Reuters: severe wounds, possible leg loss) increasingly fits the facts better than tactical-pause reading. Vahidi node CREATED at REPORTED April 23. The Friday 23:59 IST trigger framework assumed a Mojtaba statement would be a de-escalatory unifier — IF Vahidi orchestrates a hardline Mojtaba message (or a Vahidi-ghostwritten statement in Mojtaba's name), the trigger fires but the downstream cascade is the OPPOSITE direction. Absence of any Mojtaba-in-Vahidi's-name statement through Day 42 is itself consistent with Mojtaba being genuinely incapacitated rather than tactically silent.
sources: The Conversation 'Who is calling the shots in Iran?'

signals.content: DAY 43 — SILENCE BROKEN, OPPOSITE-DIRECTION OUTCOME [CONFIRMED statement content + coordinated Press TV/Tasnim/IRNA relay; CLAIMED author-identity]. Mojtaba's second attributed statement since his March 12 first-message was published on X Thursday and carried by Press TV and Tasnim Friday. Core content: 'Due to the strange unity created among compatriots, a fracture has occurred in the enemy' — explicitly inverting Trump's 'seriously fractured' framing onto the US side. Statement calls for 'expressing gratitude for this blessing through practical steps' to make 'national unity greater and more steely' and warns 'the enemy's media operations, by targeting the minds and psyches of the people, intend to undermine national unity.' Statement was issued AFTER three-branch coordinated unity statements Thursday evening (Pezeshkian/Ghalibaf/Mohseni-Ejei) — ISW reads as 'acknowledging' the three-branch obeisance, 'likely seeks to demonstrate unity and signal an end to the internal competition.' This is the OPPOSITE-DIRECTION outcome the vahidi.json trigger-point file flagged: a Vahidi-orchestrated hardline signal rather than a de-escalatory unifying intervention. Statement is TEXT-only (X post + state-TV relay) — no video, no audio; the 'appears on video/audio' trigger remains UNFIRED. NYT April 23 (relayed via ISW): Mojtaba under frequent medical attention, 'heavily reliant on the advice and guidance of senior IRGC commanders led by Vahidi' — cleanest operational confirmation that 'Mojtaba-silence-then-intervention' framework has been supplanted by 'Vahidi-speaks-through-Mojtaba' architecture. (Sources: Press TV 'Leader: Remarkable unity among Iranians shatters enemy ranks', Tasnim 'Iranian Unity Deals Major Blow to Enemy Front', Business Standard, ANI, Times of Oman, ISW Critical Threats Iran Update April 21-23, NYT April 23)
signals.verification: CONFIRMED statement + coordinated relay. CLAIMED (REPORTED) on Vahidi-ghostwriting vs genuine Mojtaba authorship. Video/audio trigger remains UNFIRED.

signals.content: DAY 44 SATURDAY SILENCE — NO NEW STATEMENT [CONFIRMED ABSENCE]. No new Mojtaba statement issued Saturday April 25 across IRNA, Press TV, Tasnim, Fars, or his X account as of 11:00 IST. Friday's 'fracture has occurred in the enemy' coordinated relay remains the operative latest. The 'appears on video/audio' trigger remains UNFIRED. Saturday silence consistent with two readings: (1) Friday statement was the planned culmination of Thursday's three-branch unity choreography and no follow-up is required; (2) Mojtaba's medical condition prevents real-time response to the Witkoff-Araghchi-Islamabad track. NYT April 23 medical sourcing now amplified by Israel Hayom April 23 ('Injured and isolated, Mojtaba Khamenei rules Iran through a tight inner circle') — graduates from REPORTED to stronger REPORTED with operational weight. ISW track-record framework (April 23-24): Mojtaba's voice is held in reserve for a unity-projection moment if a deal emerges or for a hardline pivot if it does not. (Sources: Press TV / Tasnim / IRNA / Fars front pages April 25; ISW Critical Threats; Israel Hayom April 23; Time April 21; CNN April 21)
signals.verification: CONFIRMED ABSENCE of new Saturday statement; medical-architecture relay graduated to triple-sourced REPORTED.

signals.content: DAY 45 SUNDAY SILENCE — TIME APRIL 21 'AI-GENERATED VIDEOS' DISCLOSURE GRADUATES MEDICAL-INCAPACITATION THESIS TO STRONGLY REPORTED [CONFIRMED ABSENCE + SIX-SOURCE CONVERGENCE]. No new Mojtaba statement issued Sunday April 26. Time magazine April 21 piece 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' confirms: 'more than six weeks after he was announced as their new supreme leader following the assassination of his father, Iranians have still not seen or heard Mojtaba Khamenei... The regime has even used AI-generated videos to show Khamenei delivering messages, fueling speculation that the new supreme leader is incapacitated or abroad.' This is the first specific technical mechanism disclosed for the silence — regime willing to fabricate Mojtaba's voice rather than have him speak, which both confirms the Vahidi-speaks-through-Mojtaba architecture and adds a new evidentiary layer (any future 'Mojtaba statement' must now pass an AI-fabrication test). Iranian state silence on the AI-video allegation is itself data — no denial is consistent with the underlying claim. Six-source convergence (Time, CNN, Jerusalem Post, NYT, Israel Hayom, ISW) graduates medical-incapacitation thesis to STRONGLY REPORTED. (Sources: Time April 21, CNN April 21, Jerusalem Post April 21, NYT April 23, Israel Hayom April 23, ISW Critical Threats April 23)
signals.verification: CONFIRMED ABSENCE; STRONGLY REPORTED medical/AI-video architecture (six-source convergence).

signals.content: MASHHAD 'MARTYRS' MURAL DEPICTS MOJTABA ALONGSIDE DECEASED LEADERS — DAY 46 SILENCE HOLDS [CLAIMED — mural exists CONFIRMED; death inference SPECULATIVE]. New mural unveiled in Mashhad Sunday April 26 titled 'Martyrs' shows portraits of those killed in the war between Iran and US-Israel forces. At centre: large portrait of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei (assassinated February 28). Around him: four smaller portraits, allegedly including current Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei depicted alongside deceased figures. Iranian officials have NOT clarified, NOT denied, NOT released a Mojtaba video to refute. The Week explicitly notes: 'could not independently verify the allegations of his death… no official confirmation regarding his death.' Three reads: (a) Mojtaba is dead and regime is preparing iconographic disclosure before formal announcement; (b) tactical iconographic move (martyrdom-as-mobilisation) without literal death; (c) lower-level miscoordination at Mashhad civil-religious infrastructure level. TIE-BREAKER: a regime that has used AI-generated videos to simulate Mojtaba's voice (Time April 21) but has NOT released a refutation video Sunday-Monday in response to the viral mural — the non-response is itself a tell. If the regime could refute, it would; if it cannot, the mural's iconographic claim is operationally truer than its formal status. Iran International (diaspora) is amplifying the speculation but is not an independent source. New trigger watching: Iranian state media releases Mojtaba video/audio refuting the mural within 7 days (by 2026-05-04) — silence past that window upgrades existing six-source medical-incapacitation thesis to operational-weight. Day 46 of operational silence. (Sources: WION, The Week (India), India.com, Sunday Guardian, Al Bawaba; Iranian state media silence is the operative non-event)
signals.verification: CONFIRMED mural exists; CLAIMED on death inference; CONFIRMED ABSENCE of Iranian regime response.

signals.content: NYT/ISRAEL HAYOM PROSTHETIC-LEG + FACE-BURN DETAIL + ISW DAY 8 OPERATIVE-JUDGMENT FRAMING; MASHHAD MURAL STILL NOT REFUTED [REPORTED — sourcing-based, not directly verifiable inside Iran]. NYT reporting (cited via Israel Hayom April 23, Gateway Pundit, Globalsecurity) describes Mojtaba: three surgeries on one leg with possible prosthetic, hand surgery in recovery, severe burns to face/lips making speech difficult. Access 'extremely difficult and limited' — IRGC commanders avoiding in-person visits to prevent Israel tracking; communication via handwritten messages in sealed envelopes through couriers on side roads. Power delegated under 'board' model, central players: Hossein Taeb, Mohsen Rezaei, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf. ISW Day 8 (Apr 21-27 evening updates) adds explicit operative judgment: 'Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is likely unable to seriously impact Iranian decision-making due to injuries sustained during the war' — first time ISW framed the medical-incapacitation thesis in operative-judgment terms (vs prior 'questions remain about'). The graph's six-source medical-incapacitation thesis is now formally adopted by ISW. Day 2 of 7-day refutation window for Mashhad 'Martyrs' mural (closes 2026-05-04) — still NOT refuted. Iran International (opposition diaspora) and Iran's state media confirm no public appearance since March 2026. The qualitative bar on Mojtaba's incapacitation has shifted decisively in the analytical community. (Sources: Israel Hayom Apr 23, NYT via Gateway Pundit + Globalsecurity, Israel Hayom Mar 23, ISW Day 8, Iran International, The Week, Euronews on Mashhad mural)
signals.verification: REPORTED (NYT/Israel Hayom characterization sourcing-based) + CONFIRMED OPERATIONAL ABSENCE.

edges.context: Day 48 silence + Mashhad 'Martyrs' mural Day 4 of 7 not refuted. Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier explicitly names Mojtaba's role as 'largely to legitimize decisions made by his generals rather than issue directives himself' — figurehead, not principal. Six-source medical-incapacitation thesis is now WIRE-LEVEL CONFIRMED via 9+ outlets carrying Reuters analysis (USNews, Times of Israel, Japan Times, Al-Monitor, Express Tribune, Fox News, Israel Hayom, MarketScreener, Kathmandu Post). 'Vahidi-speaks-through-Mojtaba' architecture intact. EDGE WEIGHT REDUCED per intel.md F5: figurehead ≠ Supreme Leader-as-principal; functional decision-making weight is materially below historical Supreme-Leader-as-supreme-decisionmaker level. Type renamed from 'supreme_leader' to 'supreme_leader_figurehead' to encode the role explicitly.

Day 48. Velayati (proxy for Supreme Leader's office): 'key to Strait of Hormuz firmly in Iran's hands' (CONFIRMED). April 10 written statement: 'new phase of management' of Hormuz. Hardest line on Hormuz permanence. Channeled through Velayati rather than direct statement — consistent with incapacitation.

Per NYT April 23 (via ISW relay): Mojtaba under frequent medical attention and 'heavily reliant on the advice and guidance of senior IRGC commanders led by Vahidi.' Mojtaba's Friday 'fracture in the enemy' statement read by ISW as Vahidi-orchestrated. 'Mojtaba-silence-then-intervention' framework supplanted by 'Vahidi-speaks-through-Mojtaba' architecture.

trigger_points.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei appears on video/audio (proof of life and command) — UPDATE 2026-04-15: Day 48. Reuters reports 'severe and disfiguring wounds,' possible leg loss. Velayati channeling statements as proxy. Conflicting reports persist (ToI, Asharq al-Awsat, Week India, i24News). Trigger remains UNFIRED.
trigger_points.mechanism: Would confirm regime stability and leadership continuity. Absence fuels uncertainty about internal power dynamics.

trigger_points.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei signals willingness to negotiate
trigger_points.mechanism: Would be the most significant de-escalation signal. Would crash oil prices and boost equities.

trigger_points.condition: Iranian state media releases Mojtaba Khamenei video/audio refuting Mashhad 'Martyrs' mural within 7 days (by 2026-05-04)
trigger_points.mechanism: Mashhad mural unveiled Sunday April 26 depicts Mojtaba alongside deceased leaders. Regime has used AI-generated videos to simulate Mojtaba's voice (Time April 21 disclosure) but has NOT released a refutation video Sunday-Monday in response to the viral mural — non-response is itself a tell. Activation criterion: confirmed Mojtaba video/audio appearance on IRNA/Press TV/Tasnim/Fars carrying current-event framing that is verifiably present-tense (i.e., not AI-fabricated).
